description:
The OutlinedArc component takes in many parameters to create a circular image or design and can be controlled using those parameters. Then this renders onto the UIX.

}}

fields.Arc: The amount to arc around the center.
fields.Offset: The amount to rotate around the center.
fields.OuterRadiusRatio: The outer distance for this arc from the center.
fields.InnerRadiusRatio: The inner distance for this arc from the center.
fields.RoundedCornerRadius: The amount of how rounded the edges of the arc end points are.
fields.FillColor: The inner color (filled in color) of this arc.
fields.OutlineColor: The outer color (the outline) of this arc.
fields.OutlineThickness: The amount to thicken for the outline.
fields.Material: Uses a material for the arc.

usage: A user could make fancy effects like a loading circular throbber, or menu buttons that arc around.
